models.role: Primary LLM — financial assistant, document RAG, QA generation
models.risk_notes: Runs entirely on-premises; no data sent to third parties.
models.transparency_obligation: Users are informed they are interacting with an AI assistant.
models.human_oversight: All outbound actions (email, WhatsApp) require explicit user confirmation.

models.role: Fallback LLM for higher-quality responses when GPU allows
models.risk_notes: Same on-premises deployment as primary model.
Audio is transcribed in-memory and not stored. Processed locally.
models.transparency_obligation: Voice interface displays recording indicator while active.
models.human_oversight: Transcript shown to user before any action is taken.

models.risk_notes: Generates audio from text responses; no personal data in model inputs.
models.transparency_obligation: Audio responses clearly identified as AI-generated.

personal_data_processed: User JWT claims (user_id, email, roles) — used for auth and audit logging only
Voice audio — transient, in-memory transcription only, never persisted
Conversation messages — stored in Redis (TTL 24h) for context window
data_not_processed: Financial positions are simulated seed data, not real client holdings

gdpr_posture.data_retention: Conversations: Redis TTL 24h. Audit log: 90 days. Deletion requests: 7 years.
gdpr_posture.data_minimisation: Only user_id and email from JWT; no address, DOB, or account numbers.

transparency_measures: Chat interface shows AI avatar and response indicator
All action confirmations clearly identify the AI as the initiator
This model register is publicly accessible in the repository
